installed_runtime.fingerprint_scope: installed versions, distribution metadata/RECORD, and import entry points; this is not a hash of every installed file

after.fingerprint_scope: the complete verified wheel RECORD, or the complete cv2/source-native OpenCV layout inside the selected venv

before.fingerprint_scope: the complete verified wheel RECORD, or the complete cv2/source-native OpenCV layout inside the selected venv

after.fingerprint_scope: distribution metadata/RECORD plus imported entry points

before.fingerprint_scope: distribution metadata/RECORD plus imported entry points

reproducibility.artifact_verification_policy: Ultralytics is force-reinstalled from a binary artifact under --require-hashes.
artifact_verified: The installed Ultralytics wheel was exact-version and SHA-256 verified.
reproducibility.claim: This report fingerprints the installed runtime; it is not a complete reproducible-environment attestation.
resolver_managed: requirements-ai.txt concrete artifacts and transitive dependencies
